phrases.english_text: Display the current course and the list of all courses in the map.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_globalcheck
phrases.english_text: Display the status of the GlobalAPI.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_gc
phrases.english_text: Display the status of the GlobalAPI.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_beam
phrases.english_text: Set or toggle player beam type (off/ground/feet).

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_beamoffset
phrases.english_text: Set or get player beam offset.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_measure
phrases.english_text: Measure the distance between two points, or measure the block distance if two points are at the same place.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_measurestart
phrases.english_text: Set the start position of the measurement.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_measureend
phrases.english_text: Set the end position of the measurement and calculate the distance.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_ztopwatch
phrases.english_text: Toggle the zone stopwatch on/off, or use subcommands: place (set next corner), clear (reset zones), startjump/sj (toggle start on jump), stopland/sl (toggle stop on land), status.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_paint
phrases.english_text: Place a paint decal on the surface you are aiming at.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_paintcolor
phrases.english_text: Set or display your paint color. Accepts a color name (red, white, black, blue, brown, green, yellow, purple) or R G B [A] values.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_paintsize
phrases.english_text: Set or display your paint size. Accepts a positive number (default: 8).

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_togglepaint
phrases.english_text: Toggle auto painting every 50ms while aiming at surfaces.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_showpaint
phrases.english_text: Toggle between showing only your own paint and showing paint from all players.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_cleardecals
phrases.english_text: Remove all decals from the map.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_autohideweapon
phrases.english_text: Toggle the automatic hiding of weapon viewmodel.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_pistol
phrases.english_text: Change or remove the current pistol.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_rpsave
phrases.english_text: Manually save past gameplay into a replay.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_replay
phrases.english_text: Play a previously saved replay, or look up a record replay by type (wr, sr, pb, etc.).

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_rpgoto
phrases.english_text: Go to a specific time in the replay. (hh:mm:ss)

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_rpgototick
phrases.english_text: Go to a specific tick in the replay.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_rpinfo
phrases.english_text: Display information about the current replay.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_rppause
phrases.english_text: Pause or resume the current replay.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_rploadprogress
phrases.english_text: Display the loading progress of the replay.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_rpcancelload
phrases.english_text: Cancel the loading of the replay.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_recordvolume
phrases.english_text: Set the volume of the world record sound effect.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_rphidelegs
phrases.english_text: Toggle replay bot's first person legs visibility.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_mapinfo
phrases.english_text: Display information about the current map.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_tier
phrases.english_text: Display the tier of the current course or a specified course.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_modernperfstats
phrases.english_text: Retrieve bhop statistics for modern jumping.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_legacyperfstats
phrases.english_text: Retrieve bhop statistics for legacy jumping.

phrases.name: Command Description - kz_resetperfstats
phrases.english_text: Reset bhop statistics for modern and legacy jumping.

Zone Stopwatch - Usage - Console
phrases.english_text:
Zone Stopwatch usage:
  !ztopwatch / !zw: Toggle on/off
  !ztopwatch place: Set next corner (cycles: start 1 -> start 2 -> end 1 -> end 2)
  !ztopwatch clear: Clear all zones
  !ztopwatch startjump / sj: Toggle start timer on jump (instead of on zone entry)
  !ztopwatch stopland / sl: Toggle stop timer on land (instead of on zone entry)
  !ztopwatch status: Show current status
